title: rhododendron periclymenoides f. eglandulosum
intro: Rhododendron periclymenoides f. eglandulosum, also known as the Appalachian rhododendron, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including high blood pressure, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rhododendron periclymenoides f. eglandulosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
